RuleSet.Name: src/schemaprot/ISchemaProtTableFactory.java

GenFile.Name: reallyFileISchemaProtTableFactoryJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$prot/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$prot

RuleSet.GenRule: $switch HasSuperClassRelation no declProtRecNewPKey default empty$$switch HasSuperClassRelation no declProtNewHPKey default empty$$iterate Index( each declProtNewNonPrimaryIndexKey )$$declProtNewRec$$declProtNewHRec$
$switch HasDefSchema default empty no reallyDeclProtNewHPKeyIfHasHistory empty empty$
$switch HasDefSchema default empty no reallyDeclProtNewHRecIfHasHistory empty empty$
